name: Blue haired woman (ooooh mysterious, who could it be?)
description:
Trying out scheduled stuff! I have a horrible sleep schedule, so I usually only get motivation at like 1 in the morning for my time, and I’ve noticed my bots underperform when I post them at that time (well all my bots recently have underperformed, but when I was at my peak i experienced more success when I posted them in the morning).

So I’m hoping this will work how I want it to. Does anyone know if scheduling it actually brings it to the top of the latest tab when it actually releases? Either way, I’ll try this out, and if it works well, I’ll probably do it more. Won’t really effect people too much since I’ll only do it when I post late/early at night

Anyways, I won’t tell you who this is. It is a she, and it is someone with blue hair. I don’t think people will be able to guess, but try? Idk man

Valentines tag, this’ll be like an established relationship character probably. But anyways, love you all, take care of yourselves. Play Elden Ring and worship Miyazaki. That’s all. Solo Inter!!!
creator: .legend
